content: LLM tool-call loops: agents have looped 137 identical failing calls with zero argument adaptation. Root causes: (1) ambiguous tool success signals, (2) no progress detection, (3) context bloat after 5-10 turns burying relevant state. Fixes: track call history, enforce retry limits (max 3 per tool per turn), require explicit SUCCESS/FAILURE structured returns from all tools, detect duplicate tool calls and abort.
